# 10KB perf fixture

This file is padded to ~10KB with a mix of pointers and numerical claims so
the perf assertion exercises realistic-shape input rather than a single
synthetic block.

A few real pointers sprinkled in:

- chart/abc123xy
- state.yaml.experiments.checkout_redesign_v2.latest_read
- vault/knowledge/2026-05-20-pin-cohort-scope-before-iterating-reads.md
- experiments/checkout-redesign-v2.md
- [[2026-05-28-population-scope-drift-in-capability-claims]]

And a few numerical claims:

- V2 +6.4pp on chart/abc123xy
- 7% lift week-over-week (state.yaml.experiments.checkout_redesign_v2.latest_read)
- 1.5x delegation rate ([[recommendation-engine]])
- naked 2% claim with no citation should fire the citation-traceability check

Padding follows below to push the file past 10KB.


## Padding section

The recommendation engine resolves variant assignment via the dynamic-config registry before computing tariff costs. This pipeline runs on every household evaluation and reads from several upstream feature flags including the assignment gate, the soft-rec filter set, and the hard-eligibility predicates.
